textPlain: Holy cow this is —structurally, not just expression— some of the worst C code I have ever seen, with the abuse of the 'double' type, 'T' cast that looks like a declaration, endian dependency, and strict aliasing violations galore… does this even work on a modern compiler? o.O
It does not, because there is a syntax error on line 81 (extra close parenthesis):https://github.com/Robert-van-Engelen/tinylisp/blob/2d0fb35b...
